title: protium osseum
side_effects: Protium osseum can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems in individuals with sensitivities. In some cases, prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts can lead to nausea, dizziness, and stomach discomfort. There is also a risk of interactively causing blood pressure fluctuations and irregular heartbeats in people taking certain medications. Furthermore, improper handling of the plant can result in an increased risk of infection due to the presence of pathogens on its surface.
